cc:Work.dc:title: BasedBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
Fully closed box on a base
This box is more of a building block than a finished item. Use a vector graphics program (like Inkscape) to add holes or adjust the base plate. The width of the "brim" can also be adjusted with the **edge_width** parameter in the **Finger Joints Settings**.
See ClosedBox for variant without a base.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes BasedBox --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=3 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --x=250 --y=340 --h=35 --outside=0 --outside=1 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=1 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes BasedBox --FingerJoint_edge_width=3 --x=250 --y=340 --h=35 --spacing=1 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=3&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=250&y=340&h=35&outside=0&outside=1&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=1&debug=0&language=en&render=2 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?FingerJoint_edge_width=3&x=250&y=340&h=35&spacing=1 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=3&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=250&y=340&h=35&outside=0&outside=1&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=1&debug=0&language=en&render=2 SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?FingerJoint_edge_width=3&x=250&y=340&h=35&spacing=1

g.aria-label: Poker Size Card Template 2.5" x 3.5" (63.5 x 88.9 mm)
